name: Arizer XQ2 Glass Heater Cover
summary: The Arizer XQ2 Glass Heater Cover comes with a screen and insulation sleeve, serving as a replacement for the internal glass heater cover.
description: The Arizer XQ2 Glass Heater Cover comes with a screen and insulation sleeve, serving as a replacement for the internal glass heater cover. This essential piece provides coverage for the heating element, ensuring safety and optimal functioning. If the cover becomes cracked or damaged, it is recommended to replace it immediately for your own safety. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
